name: Hillary Clinton
subject: re: your commitment
body:
Not about who can shout the loudest | Derek --

With just three days left until our biggest fundraising deadline yet, we’re in danger of being outraised by the Trump campaign for the first time in this election. That’s why we’ve set an ambitious goal of raising $10 million online during this final week -- and we’re still looking for 19 people from your area to chip in today to help us get there. **[Can you help right now?](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjYzNTg2NzAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODY0OTU0MzMzS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Your donation isn’t just about money -- it’s a statement that amidst all the noise and furor of the Trump campaign, you’re committed to fighting for American values.

Because after all, this election isn’t about who can shout the loudest. It’s about the dad I met in West Virginia who wants to help his daughter overcome her struggle with substance abuse, or the mom in Iowa who balances caring for her young son with classes at her local community college. It’s about the 15-year-old girl in Queens who has to comfort her younger sisters when they tell her they’re afraid Donald Trump will deport their family because they’re Muslim.

Donald Trump is betting on anger and divisiveness to carry his campaign -- and his fundraising -- in this election, but Derek, as this FEC deadline approaches, I’m counting on this team to come through to hit our big $10 million goal.

**Will you chip in right now -- and get a free sticker while you're at it -- to show everyone on this team -- and across America -- that we’re all in this together, fighting not just for ourselves, but for each other? Trump is doing everything he can to outraise us, but I know this team has what it takes to come out on top:** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjYzNTg2NzAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODY0OTU0MzMzS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Hillary

|
**Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 before our monthly fundraising deadline to stand with this team:**

| [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjYzNTg2NzAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODY0OTU0MzMzS0&mt=1&rt=0)

---

**** | | Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 2 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House).
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjYzNTg2NzAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODY0OTU0MzMzS0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjYzNTg2NzAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODY0OTU0MzMzS0&mt=1&rt=0). Opening this email on your iPhone? [Click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjYzNTg2NzAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODY0OTU0MzMzS0&mt=1&rt=0) to get our Hillary 2016 mobile app now. Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjYzNTg2NzAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODY0OTU0MzMzS0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjYzNTg2NzAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODY0OTU0MzMzS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjYzNTg2NzAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODY0OTU0MzMzS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjYzNTg2NzAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODY0OTU0MzMzS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjYzNTg2NzAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODY0OTU0MzMzS0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjYzNTg2NzAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODY0OTU0MzMzS0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjYzNTg2NzAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODY0OTU0MzMzS0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjYzNTg2NzAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODY0OTU0MzMzS0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Eric=20Greitens?=
subject: Our Statewide Tour
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for Missouri, Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer
body:
Dear Peter,

I just wanted to thank everyone who joined us at a stop this weekend on our statewide kickoff tour. It's clear that Missourians are ready to take our state in a new direction - they're tired of the failed status quo that Chris Koster represents.

We launched our tour with packed stops in Springfield and Branson on Thursday.

_" Republican gubernatorial candidate Eric Greitens received support from Branson Mayor Karen Best Thursday evening at the opening of a campaign office at Ballparks of America." \- [Branson Tri-Lakes News](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=563e9eb120&e=84041254e6)_

We started Friday in Joplin with Congressman Billy Long. Then we hit Lee's Summit, St. Joe, and Kirksville.
**_" Greitens stresses family role in campaign" \- [St. Joseph News-Press](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=fd3f9989e5&e=84041254e6)_**
_**" Greitens Slams Koster's Leadership At Lee's Summit Campaign Stop" \- [KCUR](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=c75ebc2efb&e=84041254e6)**_
_" Guys, let me ask you. Are you ready to win? We're ready to win. We've got 74 days until the election -- 74 days," Greitens said. "I promise you that every minute, of every hour, of every day, over the course of the next 74 days, I'm going to outwork Chris Koster." \- [Kirksville Daily Express](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=f6cc1d9a83&e=84041254e6)_
Catherine Hanaway joined us Saturday morning in St. Louis and St. Charles. Over 250 fired up volunteers were there, ready to get started hitting the phones and knocking on doors!
_**

**_

Then it was off to Columbia. We had fantastic events in Rolla and Cape Girardeau with Congressman Jason Smith to cap off the tour.

_**
Greitens stops in Columbia, vows to take the state in new direction**
"Greitens drew about 100 people to his local campaign office during the ninth stop of his three-day tour of the state." \- [Columbia Missourian](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=5b81a83a4f&e=84041254e6)_

This was just the beginning. We need your help today. Join our mission \-- [volunteer](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=df2d0302c7&e=84041254e6) or [pitch in](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=3832dd377a&e=84041254e6). With all of us working together, we can take Missouri in a new direction.

It starts with you.

Best,
Eric Greitens
Paid for by Greitens for Missouri, Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer
4579 Laclede Avenue #138
St. Louis, Missouri 63108
Eric is a former member of the United States Navy having served four deployments overseas. Use of his military rank, titles and photographs in uniform does not imply an endorsement from the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
This email was sent to dpwillis67+greitens@gmail.com. You can also follow us on [Facebook](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=49ad2cd67d&e=84041254e6) and [Twitter](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=e57b8f393d&e=84041254e6). Emails are one of the best ways to stay connected with the campaign. If they become too much, you can [unsubscribe](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=3f71c40094&e=84041254e6&c=43fce1b837), but please let us know how we can improve. You can always reach us at [team@ericgreitens.com](mailto:team@ericgreitens.com) or (314) 899-0288. You're still reading the fineprint? You must be a detail oriented, all-around awesome person who is a big supporter — you should [volunteer](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=d6c006ede2&e=84041254e6) with us!

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: This country needs a strong leader
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint
body:
Peter,

Have you had a chance to accept my challenge from yesterday?

I emailed you to let you know that I am going to personally match
every donation made up to $1 million by my supporters until the
end of August.

Why am I doing this? Because that's how firmly I believe we can
win this election and make America great together.

Friend, this country needs a strong leader who will fight on
behalf of the American worker and won't cave to the pressures of
foreign leaders who are trying to rip us off.

These Washington politicians have been silencing the American
people for too many years. That's why I decided to run for
president, because the American people needed a voice. I am your
voice.

I will always stand and fight for you. So, Peter, will you
stand with me by making a contribution?

name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: If Trump outraises us…
body:
Don't let the August lull get to you | I’ll be straight with you, Derek -- August isn’t shaping up to be our best month in terms of fundraising.

We're still lagging behind where we were in July, and the timing isn't ideal. The first ballots will be cast in a matter of weeks, so we need to have a comprehensive, well-staffed and well-funded ground game to make sure that they’re cast for Hillary.

I know many people are enjoying their summers and trying to think about anything other than this election. But we need to raise $10 million by the end of the month to keep our budget on track -- and we’re only 64% to goal right now.

**[Don’t let the August lull get to you, Derek. Chip in right now, get a free sticker, and help us end the day at 75% to goal.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjYzNTg3MTMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODY0OTU1OTc0S0&mt=1&rt=0) **

How much we raise in August matters. This is our last FEC report before early voting begins. It’s our last chance to show people how strong and committed we are before they make their final decision about whom to support.

If Trump outraises us because his team rose to the occasion, it won't just look bad. It will mean his team is more prepared than we are -- right as people begin to cast their ballots.

**You’ve carried us this far, Derek. We’re almost to the finish line. But these final weeks are the most crucial of the entire eighteen-month race. We can’t drop the ball now. We can’t let up. Let’s make the final push, get to $10 million, and show Donald Trump that this team is an unbeatable force:** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjYzNTg3MTMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODY0OTU1OTc0S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you,

Robby

Robby Mook
Campaign Manager
Hillary for America

|
**Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 before our monthly fundraising deadline to stand with this team:**

Your support matters to Russ. | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf448d/1c469400/703a4fa/3574b64/782571789/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-august?utm_source=ema_2016-08-29_EOM3_nd_3test&refcode=ema_2016-08-29_EOM3_nd_3test&utm_campaign=EOM3&utm_medium=ema") Friend, If you're like me, you've been observing this political season with disbelief and deep concern for America. I watch opportunistic politicians pit citizen versus citizen, reinforcing a destructive mindset that says one can only win by making others lose. Our government is fundamentally stuck and seems incapable of addressing the challenges of our times. Our supreme court only has eight justices and we can't even have a conversation about Merrick Garland, much less a confirmation. It's easy to want to ignore it all. But if we do that, we risk turning our backs on the people who actually have our backs. **Russ Feingold is one of those people. And we need to have his back in return.** **[Will you make a $3 contribution to Russ' campaign before the August 31 deadline?](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf448d/1c469400/703a4fa/3574b64/782571789/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-august?utm_source=ema_2016-08-29_EOM3_nd_3test&refcode=ema_2016-08-29_EOM3_nd_3test&utm_campaign=EOM3&utm_medium=ema")** _Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_ | | [$3 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf448d/1c469400/703a4fa/3574b65/782571789/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-august?utm_source=ema_2016-08-29_EOM3_nd_3test&refcode=ema_2016-08-29_EOM3_nd_3test&utm_campaign=EOM3&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=3")

Russ has spent his life protecting Medicare and Social Security, standing up for economic justice, and fighting for working people everywhere. Russ is a true Wisconsin progressive with a platform to match: lifting the burden of debt from college students and graduates, making new investments in infrastructure and clean energy, and giving minimum-wage workers a long-overdue raise.
And as a longtime environmental activist, he's a candidate I trust to protect our land, air, and water and address the existential threat of climate change.
Your support matters to Russ. His campaign isn't funded by corporate super PACs or powerful billionaires. It's funded by grassroots contributions from people like you.
**[Stand with Russ. Make a grassroots contribution of $3 before the August 31 deadline.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf448d/1c469400/703a4fa/3574b64/782571789/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-august?utm_source=ema_2016-08-29_EOM3_nd_3test&refcode=ema_2016-08-29_EOM3_nd_3test&utm_campaign=EOM3&utm_medium=ema")**
It can be discouraging to think about the power and money super PACs wield. But you know what isn't discouraging? The knowledge that grassroots donations like yours can be just as powerful. And when Russ wins this senate seat, I know he'll work tirelessly to overturn Citizens United and reform our broken election system.
If you share my admiration for Russ Feingold's progressive activism and want to see more leaders like him in Washington, I'm asking you to share in my support for his campaign by making a donation today.
Thank you,
Robert Redford

subject: Tell Republican leaders: Stop playing politics with the Zika crisis
body:
**[Tell Republican leaders: Stop playing politics with the Zika crisis](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/Zs3P/6/Z/r5cs/6FRa4s/syIcPB7alB)**
_Tell Republican leaders:_
**" Stop playing politics with the health of women and children. Fully fund the Obama administration and Center for Disease Control's plan to fight the Zika virus and ensure that all women have access to the full range of medical services they deserve in the face of this disease -- affordable birth control, prenatal care and abortion."**
Add your name:
[ ](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/Zs3P/s/Z/r5cs/6FRa4s/ABJujhx3n)
---
Dear Friend,
[ ](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/Zs3P/v/Z/r5cs/6FRa4s/stCXlx0XWj)
---
It is happening.
**The dangerous Zika epidemic is now rapidly spreading in the United States.** There have already been more than 510 cases of Zika in pregnant people living in the United States and at least 15 children have been born with Zika-related neurological damage.1, 2, 3 Health officials are now reporting that Zika will likely spread to other Gulf Coast states like Texas and Louisiana.4
In February, the White House and the Center for Disease Control (CDC) asked Congress to fund a $1.9 billion Zika response plan. But instead of taking action and providing the funding, the extreme right-wing Republican leadership in Congress continues to play politics with the health of women and children.
When Congress comes back from recess on September 6, McConnell and Ryan need to get the message loud and clear that it's time to take Zika seriously.
**[Tell Republican congressional leaders: Stop playing games with the health of women and children, and do what's required to fight the Zika virus. Click here to sign the petition.](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/Zs3P/z/Z/r5cs/6FRa4s/sWxUfSS4RZ)**
You'd think that Republicans, who claim to stand for "family values," would want to move quickly to stop this outbreak in its track. **But Republicans are clearly more interested in scoring political points with their base**. Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell pushed a $1.1 billion dollar package, which not only doubled-down on his party's anti-woman agenda by including contraception restrictions and blocking Planned Parenthood funding, but also promoted Republican efforts to ease pesticide restrictions and undermine clean water rules.5 Speaker of the House Paul Ryan's Zika response was even weaker, with only $622 million allocated to fight the virus.
**By failing to pass real legislation to address this crisis, congressional Republicans are opening a new front in their war on women.** They have already been waging a relentless campaign to deny women access to reproductive health care across the country -- from trying to undermine the Affordable Care Act and its contraceptive mandate, to undermining sex education, to restricting abortion access. **In the face of Zika, it 's essential that all women have access to up-to-date information, affordable birth control, and abortions, but after years of anti-woman attacks at the state and national level, those services are almost impossible to access, especially for many women of color, women in rural areas, and women living in poverty.** It's horrifying to imagine that the states with the most restrictive abortion laws in the U.S. are going to be the ones who first have to grapple with the Zika virus.6
**[Tell Republican congressional leaders: Stop playing games with the health of women and children, and do what's required to fight the Zika virus. Click here to sign the petition.](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/Zs3P/U/Z/r5cs/6FRa4s/sc7aecUKz3)**
Beyond the damage already done by their anti-woman policies, **Republicans are actively promoting a Zika response that restricts access to contraception and abortion. And their inaction is leaving low-income women to fend for themselves.** Because of Zika's presence in Miami Beach, health officials are advising pregnant women to avoid that tourist area, and to consider staying out of Miami-Dade County completely. While that may be an option for pregnant tourists, or residents of Miami-Dade who have the financial privilege to move for the duration of their pregnancies, it's a cruel warning for the majority of women who live or work in Miami-Dade. Republicans' refusal to do what's necessary to stand up for the women, children and families who will be impacted by Zika is craven, dangerous and inappropriate. It's time for them to act.
**Tell Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell and Speaker of the House Paul Ryan: Stop playing games with the health of women and children. Do what 's required to fight the Zika virus. Click the link below to sign the petition:**
**[http://act.credoaction.com/sign/Zika_Response_dems/](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/Zs3P/j/Z/r5cs/6FRa4s/UB4mbkS1Xs)**
Thanks for taking action today,
Heidi Hess, Senior Campaign Manager
[CREDO Action from Working Assets](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/Zs3P/5/R/r5cs/6FRa4s/zvwb2Jir4J)
Add your name:
[ ](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/Zs3P/r/Z/r5cs/6FRa4s/zpak1Gp9YL)
---
_References:_
1. Christine Grimaldi, "[Zika Response 'Sits Squarely With Congress' After Administration's Last-Ditch Effort](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/Zs3P/Y/1/r5cs/6FRa4s/vEEUyQtVh6)," Rewire, August 12, 2016.
2. "[Outcomes of Pregnancies with Laboratory Evidence of Possible Zika Virus Infection in the United States, 2016](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/Zs3P/e/f/r5cs/6FRa4s/s7bTnzAqMD)," Centers for Disease Control and Prevention.
3. Amrith Ramkumar, "[Zika May Cause Brain Damage in Adults, Too](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/Zs3P/3/h/r5cs/6FRa4s/U5ve3UpUWW)," August 19, 2016.
4. David Greene, "[Health Official Warns Zika Could Spread Across U.S. Gulf Coast](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/Zs3P/W/T/r5cs/6FRa4s/6ge8aFe1Ic)," NPR, August 22, 2016.
5. David Herszenhorn, "[Zika Bill Is Blocked by Senate Democrats Upset Over Provisions](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/Zs3P/x/i/r5cs/6FRa4s/6bqUhoVFAr)," June 28, 2016.
6. Alex Thompson, "[Zika is about to hit states with the most restrictive abortion laws in the US](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/Zs3P/d/o/r5cs/6FRa4s/sv8MwFDkmc), August 9, 2016.

name: Barbra Streisand
subject: I’ll be honest, Derek
body:
Nothing stops Hillary Clinton. | Derek --

I have to admit -- there have been times when I never thought I'd see a woman become president.

After all, it’s been 24 years since I said in a speech that “Men and women are clearly measured by a different yardstick” -- and through that time, it often seemed that nothing much has changed.

We see that in the way we talk about men and women who speak out. A man is commanding, a woman is demanding. He’s assertive -- she’s aggressive.

But none of that has ever stopped Hillary Clinton.

I think she's just incredible, Derek. Take it from me, it's not easy to face so much criticism and stay committed to fighting for what you believe in. But for more than four decades now, Hillary has been an advocate for women, children, and American families.

I'm proud to stand with her, and I’m excited to join her for one night only in New York City next month. **[We've extended the deadline, so add your name right now, and you could join us there!](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjYzNjI5MDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODY1MDU2NTQ4S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

It’s bound to be an exciting night -- we’ll be celebrating a great candidate in the greatest city in the world, weeks before she’s elected as the first female President of the United States.

**Hillary and I would love to see you there. Will you join us?**
[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjYzNjI5MDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODY1MDU2NTQ4S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks, and take care.

Barbra

|
**Chip in $1 to be automatically entered for the chance to meet Hillary Clinton and Barbra Streisand in New York City:**

clean_body: Nothing stops Hillary Clinton. | Derek -- I have to admit -- there have been times when I never thought I'd see a woman become president. After all, it’s been 24 years since I said in a speech that “Men and women are clearly measured by a different yardstick” -- and through that time, it often seemed that nothing much has changed. We see that in the way we talk about men and women who speak out. A man is commanding, a woman is demanding. He’s assertive -- she’s aggressive. But none of that has ever stopped Hillary Clinton. I think she's just incredible, Derek. Take it from me, it's not easy to face so much criticism and stay committed to fighting for what you believe in. But for more than four decades now, Hillary has been an advocate for women, children, and American families. I'm proud to stand with her, and I’m excited to join her for one night only in New York City next month. subject: Mike Weinholtz for Governor Newsletter + New Video!

body:
| | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/-803311985188730112/6481471505413901056)
---
_MIKE WEINHOLTZ FOR GOVERNOR NEWSLETTER_ _Haz click[aqui](https://act.myngp.com/el/-803311985188730112/6553529099451828992) para leerlo en español!_ **MESSAGE FROM MIKE** I've spent a lot of time on the road this summer, talking to voters and hearing about what matters to them. I think I expected to hear frustration and anger from Democrats and progressives, but one thing has surprised me: how often I hear the same things from Utah Republicans! Across the state conservative voters tell me that they, too, feel ignored and mistreated. They tell me that they don't believe that Gov. Herbert or the Utah legislature have listened to their concerns or represented their values. When people who are so politically different agree that the governor and legislature are failing them, the message is clear: TIME FOR CHANGE! [**Check out the new campaign video we created about my experiences on the road:**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-803311985188730112/6625586693489756928?v=MnYEJ6mHD20) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/-803311985188730112/6697644287527684864?v=MnYEJ6mHD20) Together with you, Mike
* * *
**CAMPAIGN LUAU WITH UTAH 'S PACIFIC ISLANDER COMMUNITY** It's no secret that our current governor and legislature ignore Utah's minority communities. I've been meeting with leaders from Utah's Pacific Islander community to try and help fix that problem. My team has been working overtime to make sure that we really _listen_ and _understand_ their unique concerns-- and address them in our campaign efforts!_(Check out the_[ _video from our panel_](https://act.myngp.com/el/-803311985188730112/6769701881565612800) _with community leaders,_[_pictures from our campaign meet-and-greet_](https://act.myngp.com/el/-803311985188730112/6841759475603540736) _, or the_[ _campaign 's endorsement_](https://act.myngp.com/el/-803311985188730112/6913817069641468672) _by the Asian-American Pacific Islander Caucus!)_ Together with these community leaders, as well as the amazing Margarita Satini (Chair of Utah Pacific Islander Civic Engagement Coalition), DJ Sugarhouse, the incredible Malialole Dance crew-- plus an army of devoted volunteers-- we threw a luau to honor our vibrant Utah Pacific Islander community with an evening of traditional food, fun, and dance! (They even made me try dancing onstage with Maori poi balls...let's just say I promise I'll govern better than I dance!) [**Check out the video here:**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-803311985188730112/6985874663679396608?notif_t=like&notif_id=1472291691129303) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/-803311985188730112/7057932257717324544?notif_t=like&notif_id=1472291691129303) **Visit**[**Pacific Islanders for Mike**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-803311985188730112/7129989851755252480)**on Facebook to learn more and get involved!**
* * *
**FROM MOMENT TO MOVEMENT** This campaign has become more than a 'moment' in Utah politics-- it's become a _MOVEMENT_! We have a Field Team (organizers who make phone calls, knock on doors, and coordinate volunteers) of over 30 people-- and growing! We have dozens of passionate grassroots volunteers all across the state, from St. George to Logan, with more joining each week! [](https://act.myngp.com/el/-803311985188730112/7202047445793180416) Our fundraising is grassroots, too: I'm refusing any corporate money to my campaign, and we have over _800 INDIVIDUAL DONORS_ who have made more than 1,000 financial contributions. (As contrast, Gov. "Available Jones" Herbert has raised over $2 million dollars just from corporations and PACs, while less than 200 individual people have donated to his campaign.) There are just over 2 months until Election Day, so if you haven't already gotten involved with the campaign, there's no time left to lose: **[join the Movement!!](https://act.myngp.com/el/-803311985188730112/7202047445793180416)** **Click**[**HERE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-803311985188730112/7202047445793180416)**to volunteer,**[**HERE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-803311985188730112/7346162633869036288)**to donate now-- or click**[**HERE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-803311985188730112/7418220227906964224?c=0&w=1)**to apply for a job as a Field Organizer!**
* * *
**DONALD TRUMP ISN 'T WELCOME IN UTAH!** I'm sick of hearing about Donald Trump, and I bet you are too. He's completely unfit for office, and his ideas are dismissable because they're outright absurd. There's really not much more to say. But when our current governor wouldn't stand up for Utah and reject this clown, I couldn't stay silent: I wrote an op-ed about how our elected officials should show some courage and choose country over party. [**Check it out here:**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-803311985188730112/7490277821944892160) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/-803311985188730112/7490277821944892160) P.S. Shortly after my op-ed, instead of rejecting Trump like a true leader, Gov. "Available Jones" took the low road and [endorsed Donald Trump](https://act.myngp.com/el/-803311985188730112/7634393010020748032) for president. **[Get involved now](https://act.myngp.com/el/-803311985188730112/7202047445793180416) to elect real leadership in Utah!**
* * *
**HELP GET THE WORD OUT!** YOU can help us reach every single voter in Utah before November: follow the campaign social media channels, and be sure to Like, Share, and Re-tweet your favorites! **Check us out now on**[**Facebook**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-803311985188730112/7706450604058675968)**,**[**Twitter**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-803311985188730112/7778508198096603904)**,**** ****[YouTube](https://act.myngp.com/el/-803311985188730112/7850565792134531840) and ****[Instagram](https://act.myngp.com/el/-803311985188730112/7922623386172459776)!** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/-803311985188730112/7706450604058675968)[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-803311985188730112/7778508198096603904)[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-803311985188730112/7850565792134531840)[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-803311985188730112/7922623386172459776)
* * *
**_My campaign isn 't taking any corporate money, which means that the only way we can win is through support from individuals like you!_** **_Click_**[** _here_**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-803311985188730112/7346162633869036288)** _to contribute now!_**

I've been meeting with leaders from Utah's Pacific Islander community to try and help fix that problem. My team has been working overtime to make sure that we really listen and understand their unique concerns-- and address them in our campaign efforts!(Check out the with community leaders, , or the by the Asian-American Pacific Islander Caucus!) Together with these community leaders, as well as the amazing Margarita Satini (Chair of Utah Pacific Islander Civic Engagement Coalition), DJ Sugarhouse, the incredible Malialole Dance crew-- plus an army of devoted volunteers-- we threw a luau to honor our vibrant Utah Pacific Islander community with an evening of traditional food, fun, and dance! (They even made me try dancing onstage with Maori poi balls...let's just say I promise I'll govern better than I dance!) Visit Facebook to learn more and get involved! FROM MOMENT TO MOVEMENT This campaign has become more than a 'moment' in Utah politics-- it's become a MOVEMENT! We have a Field Team (organizers who make phone calls, knock on doors, and coordinate volunteers) of over 30 people-- and growing! We have dozens of passionate grassroots volunteers all across the state, from St. George to Logan, with more joining each week! Our fundraising is grassroots, too: I'm refusing any corporate money to my campaign, and we have over 800 INDIVIDUAL DONORS who have made more than 1,000 financial contributions. (As contrast, Gov. "Available Jones" Herbert has raised over $2 million dollars just from corporations and PACs, while less than 200 individual people have donated to his campaign.) There are just over 2 months until Election Day, so if you haven't already gotten involved with the campaign, there's no time left to lose: Click volunteer, donate now-- or click apply for a job as a Field Organizer! DONALD TRUMP ISN 'T WELCOME IN UTAH! I'm sick of hearing about Donald Trump, and I bet you are too. He's completely unfit for office, and his ideas are dismissable because they're outright absurd. There's really not much more to say. But when our current governor wouldn't stand up for Utah and reject this clown, I couldn't stay silent: I wrote an op-ed about how our elected officials should show some courage and choose country over party. P.S. Shortly after my op-ed, instead of rejecting Trump like a true leader, Gov. "Available Jones" took the low road and for president. to elect real leadership in Utah! HELP GET THE WORD OUT! YOU can help us reach every single voter in Utah before November: follow the campaign social media channels, and be sure to Like, Share, and Re-tweet your favorites! Check us out now on, and ! My campaign isn 't taking any corporate money, which means that the only way we can win is through support from individuals like you! Hey --

I'm thrilled that after months of hard work, we've had THREE polls in recent weeks show Katie in the lead against Pat Toomey. **Grassroots supporters like you made that happen.**

Everyone from the _New York Times_ to Nate Silver's _FiveThirtyEight_ is saying this is the race that could decide control of the Senate (and the next Supreme Court justice). **The outcome of this race will be felt far, wide, and for a very long time.**

[**We need to raise $37,000 by midnight on August 31st to finish the month out strong and power us through Election Day. Quick, can you chip in now?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-729380696350523392/8720683017216983040?refcode=e20160829.2&refcode2=e20160829.2nd&amount=25)

Pat Toomey himself has said that this year **" everything is at stake**...the presidency, Supreme Court, the Senate, the House, the entire direction of our country." No wonder his well-funded allies (Mitch McConnell and the Kochs!) are throwing millions of dollars into Pennsylvania to try to stop our momentum.

**There 's no room for error. Working families -- in Pennsylvania and across the nation -- are counting on us, and we can't afford to let them down.**

**[Please: Donate Now>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/-729380696350523392/8720683017216983040?refcode=e20160829.2&refcode2=e20160829.2nd&amount=25)**
Thanks --

Mike Mikus
Chief Strategist
| *** A note on donations ***

Katie is fighting for working families in PA -- but we're up against major special interest spending. We're relying on grassroots donations from people like you to win this race and take back the Senate.
**Chip in $5 today. Thank you.**

| Friend, **I'm honored to answer Eric Holcomb's call to be his running mate this fall.**

Eric is the leader that Indiana needs. He is a proven consensus builder with a strong record of getting things done.

Eric understands that commonsense, conservative principles are the keys to continuing Indiana’s momentum and will work tirelessly as your Governor to make Indiana a model state for the nation to follow – and I’m proud to do all I can to be a part of it.

I hope you are as excited for the future as I am, but before we look too far ahead to the election, we have an important deadline coming up in just 2 days. **We need to raise $32,000 this month in order to stay on track.

[Will you help us win in November by beating our August fundraising goal today?](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/337af49aa4784579bb384b7e03c2f84b?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&_m=190625b69e494778abcde6d89ad4161a&utm_source=Iterable&utm_medium=text_body_cta_1&utm_term=Fundraising_Deadline&utm_campaign=eom&utm_content=20160829-honored-to-answer-the-call-13704-direct)**

We need to hit each and every goal between now and Election Day in order to guarantee victory – starting with this one.

**[Contribute today to beat our August fundraising goal.](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/6b355f6503de42adb8bbaf01237b21cb?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&_m=190625b69e494778abcde6d89ad4161a&utm_source=Iterable&utm_medium=text_body_cta_2&utm_term=Fundraising_Deadline&utm_campaign=eom&utm_content=20160829-honored-to-answer-the-call-13704-direct)**

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: Winning the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
body:
Sisters and Brothers,
As a result of your activism, our political revolution is responsible for the most progressive Democratic platform in the history of our country. We were victorious in making it a clear priority of the Democratic Party to fight for a $15 an hour federal minimum wage, expand Social Security, abolish the death penalty, put a price on carbon, enact major criminal justice reforms, end for-profit prisons and detention facilities, break up too-big-to-fail banks and create a 21st century Glass-Steagall Act, and so much more.
And just the other day, the Republican leadership in the Senate announced that the TPP would not be coming to the floor this year. Another major victory.
All of that is the direct result of the grassroots activism that you, and millions of others, engaged in over the last 16 months. Now, we must continue our efforts by electing progressive Democrats up and down the ballot so that the policies we have fought for can advance and become law.
**For the future of our country, and our progressive agenda, it is imperative that Democrats regain control of the Senate. My guess is that will all come down to which party wins three or four hotly contested races in states like Pennsylvania, New Hampshire, Ohio and Nevada.**
The Koch brothers know this. That is why they are spending tens of millions of dollars to defeat these four candidates for Senate.
And that's why I'm asking you to support them: Katie McGinty in Pennsylvania, Maggie Hassan in New Hampshire, Ted Strickland in Ohio, and Catherine Cortez Masto in Nevada. If these four Democrats win the tight elections they are currently in, the Democrats will almost certainly take control of the Senate.
And what a world of difference that will make: real campaign finance reform, raising the minimum wage, making public colleges and universities tuition free, addressing the planetary crisis of climate change, progressive taxation, reforming our broken criminal justice system, comprehensive immigration reform and many other important issues.
[**Split a $2.70 contribution to help Katie McGinty, Maggie Hassan, Ted Strickland, and Catherine Cortez Masto become senators and take back a progressive majority in the Senate.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/us_senate_slate?refcode=em160829-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/us_senate_slate?refcode=em160829-full")
I want to be clear: It is very important that our movement holds public officials accountable. The Democratic Party passed an extremely progressive agenda at the convention. Our job is to make sure that platform is implemented. That will not happen without Democratic control of the Senate.
* **Katie McGinty** was one of the first candidates to endorse a $15 minimum wage.
* **Maggie Hassan** , who is a strong supporter of campaign finance reform, increased transparency and disclosure of political contributions as Governor of New Hampshire.
* **Ted Strickland** is a fighter for Ohio's working families who opposes the TPP and believes that we need to completely change the way we negotiate trade deals.
* **Catherine Cortez Masto** is committed to protecting the environment and knows it's long past time that we ensure equal pay for women.

Perhaps the most important reason to win a progressive majority in the Senate is because we must support nominees for the Supreme Court who will vote to overturn Citizens United.
It is so important we do everything we can to help these four candidates - Katie McGinty in Pennsylvania, Maggie Hassan in New Hampshire, Ted Strickland in Ohio, and Catherine Cortez Masto in Nevada - win their elections in November.
[**Your contribution of $2.70 will help each of these candidates for Senate win. Please split a contribution between them today so we can advance our progressive agenda, defeat the Koch brothers, and take back the Senate.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/us_senate_slate?refcode=em160829-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/us_senate_slate?refcode=em160829-full")
Thank you as always for everything you do for our political revolution.
In solidarity,
Senator Bernie Sanders
****[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/us_senate_slate?refcode=em160829-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/us_senate_slate?refcode=em160829-full")**

Contribute now >>](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2d69/738133e4/304aa68b/7f85059a/2265767711/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160829pm2?refcode=pme160829pm2_m&recurring=true&amount=25")**

I know Patrick is the right choice to defeat Marco Rubio and defend our values in the Senate:
* A candidate that can **stand up against right-wing ideology** and an onslaught of GOP spending? He's done it before. Patrick beat Tea Party extremist Allen West in the most expensive House race of the 2012 cycle, and he's ready to do it again vs. Rubio.

* Unlike Marco Rubio, Patrick will **fight for Florida families every day.** Marco Rubio barely showed up to work, and when he did, it was for all the wrong reasons (like restricting women's healthcare options and trying to raise Social Security's retirement age).

* Patrick is**right on the issues that matter.** Patrick's been a fighter -- defending a woman's right to make her own healthcare decisions, protecting LGBT rights, and combating climate change.

I joined this campaign because I know Patrick will be the leader Florida families need in the Senate. But he can't do it alone. We need the resources to match massive GOP spending from the likes of the Koch brothers and Karl Rove. _Right now, we 're behind and we're getting outspent._

name: Jimmy Carter
subject: Hillary needs us all, Derek
body:
I've known Hillary for decades. | Derek --

During my 1976 presidential run, a young woman moved to Indianapolis to help turn out the Indiana vote for me. Forty years later, I will proudly cast my vote for that same woman to be the next President of the United States.

Hillary is going to need more than just my vote, though. She’s got to keep building a campaign that can beat Trump soundly, and that takes resources. **[Chip in to get your own Team Hillary sticker and make sure her team raises $10 million by the FEC deadline on August 31st.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjYzNjc2NTkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODY1MTIzNTcwS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

I’ve known Hillary for decades -- and her record as a public servant is superb. In 1977, I appointed her to the board of the Legal Services Corporation (LSC), a nonprofit that provides legal assistance to Americans in need -- she went on to become the first woman to chair the board. Over her tenure, funding for the LSC tripled, allowing the organization to expand legal aid to every congressional district, and handle 1.5 million cases for poor clients each year. As First Lady, Clinton continued to advocate for legal services funding.

That’s a special thing about Hillary -- when there's a job worth doing, she doesn’t abandon it. Work she did decades ago, like founding Arkansas Advocates for Children and Families or helping start the Children’s Health Insurance program, is still changing lives today. Her entire career has been a fight for progress, and as our president, she’ll make sure we’re on the cutting edge of civil rights, economic justice, climate change, and more. She is the only candidate prepared to take us into the future.

**We owe it to ourselves to make her our next Commander-in-Chief. Donate now to make sure real American values are protected for generations to come:**
[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjYzNjc2NTkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODY1MTIzNTcwS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Jimmy

|
**Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 before our monthly fundraising deadline to stand with this team:**

| [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjYzNjc2NTkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODY1MTIzNTcwS0&mt=1&rt=0)
